runTitle: v8.11.173 Vercel Playwright MCP Today Reporter Change Check

AI assistant sidebar open and engine Ready indicator

expertAssessments.rationale: The recheck directly covered the changed Reporter UI/API path, report generation, detail rendering, and postmortem content on the deployed production surface.
The run used the normal production UI path and confirmed the AI engine Ready status and successful Reporter API response without bypassing app controls.
The deployed Vercel release, production dashboard OTel snapshot, Reporter API response, and Vercel usage were verified after the change.
Playwright MCP covered the browser path and durable evidence was captured; disk/SLA/dedup edge cases remain covered by targeted regression tests from the release.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period effective $11.4422, billed $0.0000; no unexpected billed usage observed after the targeted Reporter MCP recheck.

notes: Production Reporter generated an incident report for lb-haproxy-dc1-01 CPU 85% with one risk server.
Detail view displayed detected anomaly, recommended actions, pattern, and postmortem timeline.
The live snapshot did not include a critical disk breach, so the disk threshold fix was not live-triggered in this targeted production run.
